observations.archetype_gloss: Dan's mother, a dreamwalker who taught him to enter others' dreams
observations.summary: Zuna embodies the Great Mother archetype as the nurturing and guiding maternal figure who imparts the rare and dangerous ability of dreamwalking to her son Dan, facilitating his emergence into self-awareness and spiritual capacity.

evidence.quote: His mother, Zuna, had been a dreamwalker—rarer than it sounds and considerably more dangerous than it looks. She had taught Dan the same capacity before she went, which is to say: she had taught him to enter another person's sleep and move within it with deliberate intention.

accepted_observations.summary: Zuna embodies the Great Mother archetype as the nurturing and guiding maternal figure who imparts the rare and dangerous ability of dreamwalking to her son Dan, facilitating his emergence into self-awareness and spiritual capacity.
